reasoning: Thai query asks for under-¥5000/night lodging in Kyoto. Tool returns Wikidata/OSM hotel list with no price data; budget constraint cannot be respected. Names are mostly Japanese-only; Thai lang requested but not provided (RULE D constraint -1).
missing_data: price/rate data, hostel filter, Thai translations

reasoning: German free-Tokyo budget query. get_spots returns 30 Tokyo Wikidata spots with price_band field (some free, e.g. Mt Takao, Kan'eiji), but many top results have fee=yes/low and constraint 'free' is not applied. Response in en/ja not de (RULE D -1 constraint).

improvement_hint: Filter or surface price_band=free entries first when query implies free admission; honour requested lang or note fallback.

reasoning: Query asks for free-entry temples in Kamakura. Top results are Yokosuka (Jorakuji), Fukui, Niigata, Wakayama, Kochi — almost no Kamakura items. Authoritative municipal-scrape data but ranking/filter fails to restrict to Kamakura (RULE B).

reasoning: Japanese query specifically about Fukuoka yatai under ¥500. Response returns MAFF GI (Yame tea, Hakata jidori) and Japan Heritage stories — none address yatai or street-food pricing. Authoritative data but off-topic for yatai (RULE C scope mismatch).
missing_data: yatai (street food stall) data, price-per-dish info, Nakasu yatai district
improvement_hint: Add yatai/street-food dataset or surface Fukuoka tourism page yatai section; recognise 屋台 intent.

reasoning: Chinese query asks free Kyoto shrines/temples. Response is heavy on obscure Kyoto Shinto shrines (Sagara, Wakigi etc.) with no fee info; Tanashi (Tokyo) and Hieizan-DMO leak in. reasoning: English query about cheap eats in Sapporo under ¥1500. Tool returns Hokkaido MAFF GI (Yubari Melon, Tokachi yam) and Japan Heritage stories — all about regional ingredients, none about Sapporo restaurants/markets/prices. Authoritative but wrong scope for cheap-eats (RULE C).
missing_data: Sapporo markets (Nijo, Curb Market), Susukino ramen/soup-curry restaurants, prices

reasoning: Indonesian query for Osaka hostels under ¥3000. Response is dominated by luxury hotels (ANA Crowne Plaza, InterContinental, Ritz-Carlton, Conrad) with zero hostel filter and zero price data. lang=id not honoured (RULE D -1).

reasoning: Query about cheap souvenirs at 100-yen shops/supermarkets. Tool returns Aichi MAFF GI food (Hatcho miso, Toyohashi tougan) — authoritative regional specialties but not cheap-shop souvenirs. Scope mismatch (RULE C); the data IS useful as 'gift ideas' baseline. Score 3 per RULE C, not 2.
missing_data: 100-yen shop souvenir guidance, supermarket gift sections, price tiers

reasoning: Free outdoor parks in Japan query. Returns Nishiyama (Fukui) duplicated 3x as different prefectures (data corruption), plus generic parks. Authoritative-ish but heavy duplicates and weak coverage for a nationwide query (RULE B ranking dedup).
missing_data: prominent national/Shinjuku Gyoen-tier free parks, dedup, geographic spread
wrong_data: Nishiyama Park listed under Fukui市, 敦賀市, 小浜市 (only Sabae is correct)

reasoning: Korean query for free Tokyo parks/outdoor. get_spots returns Tokyo Wikidata with price_band — Mt Takao, Eitai Bridge, Kan'eiji are free; Hamarikyu/Koishikawa/Tokyo Tower are fee-yes. Mixed but useful; Korean lang not delivered (RULE D -1 on constraint).
